_comment: 8 child NPCs for Westchase FPS. race = starting ethnicity (task #72 matches kids to racially-consistent parents). h = target in-game height in game units (feeds genskin --height). age informs seed proportions. sex informs voice assignment.

LEO.seed: a 7-year-old white boy with spiky short brown hair, wearing a bright green t-shirt with a big chunky cartoon green T-rex dinosaur graphic on the chest, blue denim shorts, and red light-up sneakers

MAYA.seed: a 9-year-old Black girl with short box braids pulled back close against her head, wearing blue denim overalls over a yellow t-shirt, and white sneakers

SOFIA.seed: a 6-year-old Latina girl with a short dark bob haircut that sits close to her head, wearing a pink dress with a chunky rainbow and unicorn print, and white sandals

JAYDEN.seed: an 11-year-old Black boy with a short fade haircut, wearing a bright orange basketball jersey with a big white number on the front, black gym shorts, and white high-top sneakers

EMMA.seed: an 8-year-old white girl with a blonde ponytail, wearing a teal t-shirt with a big chunky purple butterfly graphic, purple shorts, and pink light-up sneakers

KAI.seed: a 10-year-old East Asian boy with a black bowl-cut hairstyle, wearing a blue-and-white horizontal striped t-shirt with a chunky cartoon rocket ship graphic, tan cargo shorts, and blue sneakers

PRIYA.seed: a 7-year-old South Asian Indian girl with long dark hair and a bright headband, wearing a red t-shirt with a big chunky yellow star graphic, colorful floral leggings, and white sandals

NOAH.seed: a small 5-year-old white boy with curly light-brown hair under a little red baseball cap, wearing blue denim overalls over a t-shirt with a chunky cartoon red truck graphic, and small white sneakers
